use_cases: Displaying network connections and relationships between nodes
Visualizing graph topology for social or collaboration networks
Representing data relationships in analytics dashboards
Mapping connections between entities in mapping applications
Showing organizational structures or hierarchies visually
ai_summary: A network graph visualization component that renders nodes and weighted links on a dark background using SVG. Displays interconnected data structures with customizable colors and dashed/solid line styles for links. Commonly used for representing relationships, connections, and network topology in analytics, social platforms, and data visualization tools.
